flows.rule: Each resource article must include at least 1 service link and 1 local/programmatic link.
Service pages act as cluster pillars and link to supporting resources and tier-1 local pages.
Homepage funnels authority to hubs and top tier pages.

anchor_text_examples: Local SEO for HVAC contractors in Fort Worth
Website design for roofing companies in Dallas
Google Maps optimization for plumbers in Lubbock
